name: node-mime-types
title: node-mime-types
summary: ultimate JavaScript content-type utility - Node.js module
description:
ultimate JavaScript content-type utility - Node.js module
This package provides a library for mime-type mapping similar to mime
module with some differences, such as it always returns a value, even
false if mime type is not found, and supports additional mime types.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-mime-types because ultimate JavaScript content-type utility - Node.js module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-mime-types as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-mime-types with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-mime-types --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
